title: The Impact of Poor Data Quality on Business Decisions
description: A flowchart illustrating how poor data quality introduces challenges at each stage of the data warehousing process, leading to flawed business decisions.
relationships: Poor quality data (incomplete, inconsistent, inaccurate) is extracted from sources
ETL process is hampered, requiring complex cleansing rules and potentially corrupting data further
Data Warehouse stores flawed data, becoming an unreliable 'single source of truth'
Analytics tools generate misleading insights and KPIs based on the bad data
Management makes erroneous strategic and operational decisions, leading to financial loss and loss of trust
